faqs.question: How do I RSVP or change my response?
faqs.answer: Use the [RSVP page](/rsvp) with the code from your invitation. You can return with the same link anytime to update your details before the wedding.

faqs.question: I lost my invitation code — what should I do?
faqs.answer: Please contact us using the details on the [wedding details page](/details#contact-us) and we’ll help you out.

faqs.question: Can I bring a plus-one or children?
faqs.answer: Your invitation lists who is invited. If you’re unsure, please reach out — we’d love to clarify.

faqs.question: Do you have a gift registry?
faqs.answer: You can contribute to our future together by making a cash donation towards our home.

faqs.question: Can I take photos during the ceremony?
faqs.answer: We have booked a professional photographer for the ceremony and group photos. We ask that you please refrain from taking your own photos during these times. At any other time, please feel free to take as many photos as you like! You can share your photos with us in our [digital guestbook](/guestbook), along with a message for us.

faqs.question: How do I share dietary requirements?
faqs.answer: You can note dietary needs when you [RSVP](/rsvp). If anything changes or you need to tell us more, contact us via the [details page](/details#contact-us).
